title: lipschitzia divaricata
intro: Lipschitzia divaricata, also known as Purple Verbena, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Verbenaceae family. It is a low-growing, spreading shrub that is native to South Africa and is valued for its medicinal and ornamental properties. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Lipschitzia divaricata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
